mapper.select: /* SapReturnPreOrdersMapper.xml retrunPreOrders */ SELECT A.EXTERNORDERKEY AS ISS_NO ,A.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS ISS_SEQ ,'RDC' || '_' || A.EXTERNORDERKEY || '_' || '001' AS SYSID ,A.CTKEY AS REPPART_CD ,A.PRE_OR_HD_DT AS REP_DATE ,A.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AS PA_TYP ,A.ICKEY AS ITEM_CD ,A.EXQTY AS REP_QTY ,A.DELIVERY_KEY AS KUNNR ,A.STORE_KEY AS SCUST_CD ,A.OR_HDDATE AS ISS_DATE ,A.COMMENTS AS MRK ,CASE WHEN A.ORG_UNIT=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN A.ORG_UNIT=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN A.ORG_UNIT=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE A.ORG_UNIT END AS USE_UNIT ,A.OWKEY ,A.PREKEY ,A.ORG_CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,A.ORG_CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_PREORDERS A WHERE OWKEY =#{owkey} AND OR_HDDATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND EXTERNORDERKEY IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(SAPTRANSYN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY A.EXTERNORDERKEY, A.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY
